assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud commands to verify cluster state, current versions, node pool versions, and kubectl commands to check node status and workloads

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 2 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --format="value(validMasterVersions[0:5])"' and specific check for 1.33 availability

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 5 includes 'kubectl api-versions' and 'kubectl get all --all-namespaces' commands to check for deprecated APIs that might break in 1.33

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 6 provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone=$ZONE --master --cluster-version=1.33 --project=$PROJECT_ID'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 7 includes verification commands like checking master version, component statuses, and basic kubectl functionality after control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 9 and 11 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools with --node-pool and --cluster-version=1.33 flags, though it doesn't use skip-level upgrades in this case

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 9 and 11 include 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' command to monitor upgrade progress during node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, and while it doesn't use skip-level for node pools in this specific case, it does provide the direct upgrade path

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check node versions, pod health across namespaces, kube-system pods, and overall cluster health

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes both troubleshooting commands section and rollback plan section with specific gcloud commands and important notes about master rollback limitations
